title: Waterfall / bridge variance chart
description: Data contract for the waterfall format: an opening value, a sequence of signed +/- contributions, and a closing value, drawn as floating bars linked by connectors (a bridge / variance chart). NOT a formal financial statement (no period columns, no ruled multi-line hierarchy) and NOT a dashboard. The page is a centred analysis page (~1500px): a headline strip (opening, closing, signed net delta), the waterfall chart (first/last bars are solid totals anchored to the baseline; middle steps are floating bars — up-steps --ok, down-steps --risk — with thin connector lines; a value axis with gridlines; optional subtotal bars solid and anchored to baseline), and a sortable bridge table (step, type, delta, running total, % contribution) whose rows sync-highlight with the bars on hover. The closing value is computed as opening + sum of deltas; if closing.value is supplied it must equal that sum. The sample's #report-data is a valid instance of this schema and is the canonical example.

meta.description: Shared report metadata block (identical across all formats). Brand-neutral: keep {{ORG}}/{{PROJECT}}/{{AUTHOR}} placeholders unless real values are supplied.

org.description: Reporting entity / organisation. Use the literal placeholder "{{ORG}}" when brand-neutral.

project.description: Project or reporting unit. Use "{{PROJECT}}" when brand-neutral.

reportType.description: Machine label for the deliverable kind.

title.description: Bridge title shown as the headline (e.g. the bridge being explained).

subtitle.description: Optional one-line standfirst under the title.

date.description: Issue / generation date (ISO yyyy-mm-dd). Rendered in the footer.

theme.description: Initial brand theme applied as <html data-theme>. Default for this format is "blue". "black" is always selectable in the in-report switcher.

unit.description: Unit the values are expressed in, shown beside figures and on the value axis. Mutually informative with currency; supply one. Examples: a money scale, a count, or a time unit.

currency.description: Optional currency descriptor when the bridge is monetary. If present, symbol is prefixed to figures and unit names the scale.

unit.description: Scale the figures are expressed in.

opening.description: The starting total of the bridge — the first SOLID bar, anchored to the baseline.

label.description: Name of the opening total (e.g. the prior-period or budget figure).

value.description: Numeric opening value, in the report's unit. May be negative.

note.description: Optional note shown in the opening bar's tooltip / table row.

steps.description: Ordered contributions between opening and closing, in narrative order. Each delta is a FLOATING bar starting at the running total; positive deltas use --ok, negative use --risk. A step of type "subtotal" instead draws a SOLID bar anchored to the baseline whose height equals the running total at that point (its delta is informational, not re-added). The whole bridge (bar y/heights, running totals, connectors, % contributions) is recomputed from this array on every interaction.

label.description: Step name shown under its bar and in the table.

delta.description: Signed contribution in the report's unit. For type "delta" it is added to the running total; for type "subtotal" it is the running total reached so far (used to assert/label, not re-added). Renderers should treat a subtotal delta as derived.

type.description: "delta" (default) = a floating +/- step added to the running total. "subtotal" = a solid checkpoint bar anchored to the baseline at the current running total (e.g. a gross figure mid-bridge).

group.description: Optional grouping/category tag (e.g. "Revenue", "Cost") usable for colour-coding or filtering.

note.description: Optional explanatory note shown in the bar tooltip and the table row detail.

closing.description: The ending total — the last SOLID bar, anchored to the baseline. Its value is computed as opening.value + sum of all type:"delta" steps; if value is supplied here it MUST equal that computed sum (the renderer asserts this and flags a mismatch).

value.description: Optional asserted closing value. If present it must equal opening + sum(deltas).

note.description: Optional note shown in the closing bar's tooltip / table row.

options.description: Optional initial states for the chart's interactive controls. Every control is also operable live; these only set the starting position.

runningLine.description: Start with the running-total line overlay shown.

mode.description: Start in absolute values or percent-of-opening.

sort.description: Initial step order: as entered, or by descending magnitude of |delta| (subtotals stay pinned to their position).

collapseThreshold.description: Initial value of the 'collapse minor steps into Other' threshold (in the report's unit). Steps with |delta| below this merge into one grey 'Other' step. 0 disables collapsing.

meta.title: FY2025 → FY2026 Revenue Bridge
meta.subtitle: What moved total revenue year over year · $ thousands
meta.author: {{AUTHOR}}

opening.label: FY2025 revenue
opening.note: Audited prior-year total revenue (base of the bridge).

steps.label: New-logo subscriptions
steps.note: 142 net-new enterprise logos onboarded in the year.

steps.label: Expansion / upsell
steps.note: Seat and tier expansion within the installed base.

steps.label: Subscription subtotal
steps.note: Running total after all subscription movements.

steps.label: Downgrades
steps.note: Customers moving to a lower tier.

steps.label: FX translation
steps.note: Adverse foreign-exchange movement on overseas revenue.

closing.label: FY2026 revenue
closing.note: Reported current-year total revenue (foots to the bridge).
